messages.content: You triage Driftwood (a SaaS task-tracker) support tickets. Reply with ONLY a JSON object with keys: category (string), priority (low|medium|high|urgent), sentiment (negative|neutral|positive), needs_human (boolean), draft_reply (string). No prose, no code fences.

Subject: Google SSO stopped working for the whole team

Since this morning everyone in our workspace gets 'authentication failed' when signing in with Google SSO. Nobody on the team can get in and we ship a release today.

response.content: {"category":"account_access","priority":"urgent","sentiment":"negative","needs_human":true,"draft_reply":"Thanks for reaching out about account access — we're on it and will follow up shortly."}
